title: Qualitative and Quantitative Stress Perfusion Cardiac Magnetic Resonance in Clinical Practice: A Comprehensive Review
authors_text: Wenli Zhou, Jason Sin, Andrew T. Yan, Haonan Wang, Jing Lu, Yuehua Li, Paul Kim, Amit R. Patel, Ming-Yen Ng.
abstract: This comprehensive review covers qualitative and quantitative stress perfusion cardiac magnetic resonance methods in clinical practice, including acquisition protocols, analysis techniques, and clinical applications for ischemic heart disease assessment.
